heading: Schools near naval activities: financial aid
label: 8604 Schools near naval activities: financial aid
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised sectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)7204.5 U.S.C. 421d, .Aug. 2, 1946, ch. 756, § 1360 Stat. 854, (c).5 U.S.C. 421g(b), (c), .Aug. 2, 1946, ch. 756, § 40(b)60 Stat. 858.5 U.S.C. 412a, .Aug. 2, 1946, ch. 756, § 3960 Stat. 858In subsection (b) the words “except the authority to prescribe regulations” are omitted, since contains no authority for the Secretary of the Navy to prescribe regulations for the administration of that section.5 U.S.C. 421d

Amendments2018— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 115–232section 7204 of this title1985—Subsec. (a). ran in “contribute, out of” after “Secretary of the Navy may”, and realigned margins of cls. (1) to (4) and provision following cl. (4).Pub. L. 99–1451984—, struck out “; transportation of dependents” in section catchline.Pub. L. 98–525, § 1401(j)(3)(B)Subsec. (a). , substituted “The Secretary of the Navy may” for “The Secretary of the Navy may—”, struck out “(1)” before “contribute out of”, thereby eliminating paragraph designation, redesignated cls. (A) to (D) as (1) to (4), respectively, substituted “the activity.” for “the activity; and”, and struck out par. (2), which provided for transportation between the schools and the activity when the schools are not accessible by regular means of transportation.Pub. L. 98–525, § 1401(j)(3)(A)1980—Subsec. (a)(1)(D). substituted “National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration” for “Environmental Science Services Administration”.Pub. L. 96–5131966—Subsec. (a)(1)(D). substituted “Environmental Science Services Administration” for “Coast and Geodetic Survey”.Pub. L. 89–718

Transfer of FunctionsFor transfer of authorities, functions, personnel, and assets of the Coast Guard, including the authorities and functions of the Secretary of Transportation relating thereto, to the Department of Homeland Security, and for treatment of related references, see sections 468(b), 551(d), 552(d), and 557 of Title 6, Domestic Security, and the Department of Homeland Security Reorganization Plan of , as modified, set out as a note under .November 25, 2002section 542 of Title 6

children.text: civilian officers and employees of the Department of the Navy;
members of the Coast Guard when it is operating as a service in the Navy; and
members of the National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration serving with the Navy;

children.label: b
children.text: The Secretary, to the extent he considers proper, may delegate the authority conferred by this section to any person in the Department of the Navy, with or without the authority to make successive redelegations.
